approval.note: Repository changes require diff-bound review and green CI before merge.

title: SW-013 — Build Schaufenster publication boundary
goal: Implement preview, privacy checks, sanitized immutable bundles, stable links, version metadata, expiry, withdrawal and read-only delivery.

acceptance.assertion: Only explicitly declared public sources and fields may enter a bundle.
Publication fails closed on private or unknown-visibility content.
Bundles support version, expiry and withdrawal without mutating source truth.
Published output is immutable and read-only.
